title: Hieracium chlorophilum

intro: Hieracium chlorophilum is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion-like genus Hieracium, known for its medicinal properties and edible leaves. The health benefits of Hieracium chlorophilum include its potential to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial activity, making it a popular ingredient in natural remedies. The bioactive constituents of Hieracium chlorophilum include sesquiterpene lactones, phenolic acids, and flavonoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
